failures.description: The agent misread the catalog search result and answered that 1507389580 at $1157.86 was the cheapest available Smartphone, even though the tool result showed 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: Relevant tool output was available at index 3: item 5339029584 costs $1128.99 and item 1507389580 costs $1157.86. At index 4, the agent synthesized an answer from that output but selected the higher-priced item as the cheapest, contradicting the tool result. This is a reasoning error over tool output, not an invalid invocation or underspecified intent.
